member.name: T:EpicGames.Analytics.KeyStatTelemetryRecord
member.summary: Telemetry record that describes key stats for performance tests.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.KeyStatTelemetryRecord.DynamicResolutionPercentageMax
member.summary: Dynamic resolution max percentage.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.KeyStatTelemetryRecord.CsvId
member.summary: Csv id used to create this record.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.KeyStatTelemetryRecord.GpuTimeAvg
member.summary: Average GPU time.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.KeyStatTelemetryRecord.PhysicalUsedMbMax
member.summary: Max physical memory used.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.KeyStatTelemetryRecord.DynamicResolutionVsmNanite
member.summary: Dynamic resolution through Nanite.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.KeyStatTelemetryRecord.MVP
member.summary: MVP.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.KeyStatTelemetryRecord.HitchesMin
member.summary: Hitches per minute.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.KeyStatTelemetryRecord.HitchTimePercent
member.summary: Hitch time percent.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.KeyStatTelemetryRecord.GameThreadtimeAvg
member.summary: Game thread time average.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.KeyStatTelemetryRecord.RenderThreadtimeAvg
member.summary: Render thread time average.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.KeyStatTelemetryRecord.DynamicResolutionPercentageAvg
member.summary: Dynamic reoslution percentage average.

member.name: M:EpicGames.Analytics.KeyStatTelemetryRecord.#ctor
member.summary: No arg constructor for ORM construction.

member.name: T:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.StandardTelemetryMetadata
member.summary: Utility class to handle standard telemetry operations, and metadata processing.

member.name: M:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.StandardTelemetryMetadata.SanitizeHashtable(System.Collections.Hashtable)
member.summary: Sanitizes keys of the provided source hashtable.
member.returns: A copy of the hashtable with all keys sanitized.

member.name: F:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.StandardTelemetryMetadata.StandardMetadataKeys
member.summary: The standard metadata keys.

member.name: M:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.StandardTelemetryMetadata.CreateFilteredHashtable(System.Collections.Hashtable)
member.summary: Creates a new hashtable only with the required metadata entries retained (if they exist).
member.returns: Hashtable with the required metadata entries.

member.name: T:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry
member.summary: Abstract record that describes the shared metadata for performance trend telemetry.
member.remarks: Whilst this table specifies , it does so for a narrow use in shared query context, and not against any specific table.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.EngineVersion
member.summary: The engine version of the telemetry.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.EngineReleaseVersion
member.summary: The engine release version of the telemetry.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.BuildVersion
member.summary: The build version of the telemetry.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.Platform
member.summary: The platform of the telemetry.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.TestId
member.summary: The test id for the telemetry, if applicable.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.TestName
member.summary: The test name for the telemetry, if applicable.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.TestConfigName
member.summary: The test config name for the telemetry, if applicable.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.GauntletTestType
member.summary: The test type, if applicable.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.GauntletSubTest
member.summary: The sub test type, if applicable.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.Collated
member.summary: Whether this represents collated data, or not.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.Branch
member.summary: The branch the underlying test build was produced from.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.Changelist
member.summary: The changelist the underlying test build was produced from.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.StartTimestamp
member.summary: The start timestamp of the performance trend session.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.EndTimestamp
member.summary: The end timestamp of the performance trend session.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.BuildSuffix
member.summary: The build suffix for the build string.
member.remarks: This typically refers to the test product name.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.TestBuildIsPreflight
member.summary: Int boolean representation of whether the test build was generated by preflight or not.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.Cpu
member.summary: The CPU of the hardware the performance telemetry was generated from.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.Gpu
member.summary: The GPU of the hardware the performance telemetry was generated from.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.VerbatimRhiName
member.summary: The RHI name of the hardware the performance telemetry was generated from.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.DeviceProfile
member.summary: The device profile the performance telemetry was generated from.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.TestIdentity
member.summary: The data source of the performance trend telemetry.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.SummaryName
member.summary: Summary table name.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.ComputedPlatform
member.summary: The semantic platform the telemetry was produced on.
member.remarks: This represents the coalesced result of and . represent the modern way of disambiguating between platforms (and within platforms - ex. Windows-Vulkan and !Vulkan), whereas represents a historical model.

member.name: P:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.ComputedStream
member.summary: The stream the underlying build was produced from.
member.remarks: This represents the coalesced result of and . Common local user invocations that result in telemetry emissions may not have a stream id, but will always have a branch.

member.name: M:EpicGames.Analytics.PerformanceTrends.PerformanceTrendTelemetry.#ctor
member.summary: No arg constructor for ORM construction.
Constructor.
member.param: The source table to construct the telemetry record from.
The schema version of the telemetry.
The id used to correlate telemetry emitted in the same session.
The label used to correlate telemetry emitted across multiple sessions.
True whether this is a build machine context, false otherwise.
The context in which the performance trend was generated.
